provenance.notes: dead_tree_trunk + dead_tree_trunk_02 (1k gltf) staged under source/polyhaven-dead-tree-trunk*. Needs decimation + a collision footprint before 'ready'; it is a near-range cover prop, not background canopy.

lod.label: mesh-near-only
lod.rationale: A deadfall log is gameplay cover the player gets close to; it carries a collision footprint and is culled past ~60m rather than impostor-ed. No mid/far band — once it is too far to vault, it simply stops drawing.

bands.notes: Decimate trunk to <2k tris, add a capsule/box collision footprint.
